case_title: YURII RUIZ VS. BRILLIANCE NEW YORK LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, YURII AS TO DEFENDANT BRILLIANCE NEW YORK LLC A FLORIDA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, YURII RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRILLIANCE NEW YORK LLC A FLORIDA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $14,255.79 PRINCIPAL, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,625.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
